name: Chilled Strawberry Soup#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Hull the strawberries and slice 3 berries; set aside.
2. In a covered blender container, blend the whole berries and remaining ingredients at medium speed until smooth.
3. Cover and refrigerate until well chilled.
4. Serve soup in chilled soup bowls or cups, garnished with reserved sliced strawberries.
